heading: Application of proceeds of levy
label: 6342 Application of proceeds of levy

children.heading: Expense of levy and sale
children.label: 1 Expense of levy and sale
children.text: First, against the expenses of the proceedings;

children.heading: Specific tax liability on seized property
children.label: 2 Specific tax liability on seized property
children.text: If the property seized and sold is subject to a tax imposed by any internal revenue law which has not been paid, the amount remaining after applying paragraph (1) shall then be applied against such tax liability (and, if such tax was not previously assessed, it shall then be assessed);

children.heading: Liability of delinquent taxpayer
children.label: 3 Liability of delinquent taxpayer
children.text: The amount, if any, remaining after applying paragraphs (1) and (2) shall then be applied against the liability in respect of which the levy was made or the sale was conducted.

children.heading: Surplus proceeds
children.label: b Surplus proceeds
children.text: Any surplus proceeds remaining after the application of subsection (a) shall, upon application and satisfactory proof in support thereof, be credited or refunded by the Secretary to the person or persons legally entitled thereto.
